description.en: An HVAC zone which controls to maintain either positive or negative pressure in the space.

contents.name: ventilationType
contents.comment: Designates the intended airflow composition for this pressurization zone. SupplyOnly: zone has only supply valves (no exhaust path expected). ExhaustOnly: zone has only exhaust valves or fume hoods (no supply path expected). Balanced: zone has both supply and exhaust valves. Used by Static validation to determine which relationships are required vs. unintentionally missing.
